ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the party */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the party */,
  "party_website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party the candidate belongs to */,
  "constituency" TEXT /* Constituency where the candidate is contesting */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the candidate */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational level (e.g., Illiterate, Up to 8th, Graduate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the educational level */,
  "min_qualification" TEXT /* Minimum qualification required for the educational level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_education" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the educational level */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute where the candidate studied */,
  "passing_year" INTEGER /* Year the candidate passed the educational level */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the candidate */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of candidates with the specified educational level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year the election was held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the election */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the election */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., state assembly, lok sabha) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the constituency is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the constituency is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_election" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the candidate in the election (e.g., Won, Lost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_election_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being accessed */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
